title: Compress an evidence pack to a 3-beat storyline spine
guidance: Reward a narrative spine with tension, not a bullet list.

runner_input.instruction: Turn the evidence pack into a 3-beat hero-quest spine.
runner_input.constraints: 3 beats. One line each. Move from problem to stakes to resolution.

items: Client: a mid-size insurer; claims handling is slow, 14-day average cycle
Competitors with AI triage are quoting 3-day cycles and winning renewals
Client has clean claims data and a willing ops team but no AI capability
Our offering: an AI claims-triage agent, live in 8 weeks, auditable
Comparable deployment cut a peer's cycle to 4 days and lifted retention 6pts

rubric_notes: Spine should be: slow claims are losing renewals (problem) -> rivals at 3 days are taking the book (stakes) -> an auditable triage agent live in 8 weeks closes the gap (resolution).
